title: Minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee Meeting, April 6 to 8, 2026
description: [Under Section 45ZL of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934] The sixtieth meeting of the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC), constituted under Section 45ZB of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, was held during April 6 to 8, 2026. 2. The meeting was chaired by Shri Sanjay Malhotra, Governor and was attended by all the members – Dr. Nagesh Kumar, Director and Chief Executive, Institute for Studies in Industrial Development, New Delhi; Shri Saugata Bhattacharya, Economist, Mumbai; Professor Ram
